summary_en: 23.19M shares (2.62% of outstanding) acquired for ¥101.92B under ¥200B / 54M-share authorization (Jan 29, 2026 board decision). Execution period Jan 30–May 21, 2026. Today's tranche: 4.2M shares / ¥17.52B via ToSTNeT-3. 50.96% of authorized yen limit consumed; 42.94% of share limit.
title_en: Notice of Acquisition Results for Treasury Stock via Off-Hours Matching with Specified Counterparty (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: Canon disclosed cumulative treasury stock acquisition results as of May 21, 2026, under a board authorization issued January 29, 2026. The company has acquired 23.19 million shares (2.62% of shares outstanding, excluding treasury stock) for a cumulative ¥101.92 billion via ToSTNeT-3 off-hours matching during the execution window January 30, 2026 through May 21, 2026. Today's tranche comprised 4.2 million shares for ¥17.52 billion. The authorization permits acquisition of up to 54 million shares or ¥200 billion in aggregate through January 29, 2027. As of this report date, the company has consumed 50.96% of the authorized yen budget and 42.94% of the authorized share count. The acquisitions are framed as supporting shareholder returns while enabling capital-efficient growth investment.
